---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for OpenNews
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Design Principles

Please confirm your feature aligns with OpenNews core principles:

- [ ] **Zero server dependency** — works with client-side AI and static deployment
- [ ] **Privacy first** — no tracking, no mandatory cloud APIs
- [ ] **Performance** — keeps the initial bundle light
- [ ] **Neutrality** — does not editorialize or inject bias

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or links to similar implementations.
